message:
fix(charts): 6 data display bugs — version ordering, progress calc, usage vs requests, multi-cluster delta, null gaps, header sync (#6878)

- #6869: Rollout tracker now determines newest image by semver ordering
  instead of frequency count, so v2.0.0 is correctly identified as the
  target even when fewer clusters have it than v1.9.0.

- #6871: Pending rollout clusters show actual readyReplicas/replicas
  progress instead of a hardcoded 50% placeholder.

- #6872: Resource imbalance detection now prefers actual CPU/memory usage
  over requests when both are available, preventing misleading imbalance
  signals from request-based calculations.

- #6873: Cluster delta chart renders all clusters in the workload, not
  just the first two. Legend and bar series scale dynamically.

- #6874: Missing per-cluster data points in ClusterMetrics use null
  instead of 0 so the chart renders gaps instead of false zero drops.

- #6875: ClusterMetrics header falls back to the last known non-null
  chart value when live data is temporarily unavailable, preventing a
  misleading 0 while the chart still shows historical data.

Closes #6869
Closes #6871
Closes #6872
Closes #6873
Closes #6874
Closes #6875

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
